::: {#tbl-mass .unittable}
| [US](#us){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="United States"} mass units | grain             | gram            |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------- | --------------- |
| [0.9877]{.colorMass} [grains](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Grain_(unit))                |  1                |  0.064          |
| [0.96]{.colorCara}   [carats](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carat_(mass))                |  3                |  0.192          |
| [1.1288]{.colorAvOz} [ounces](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ounce)                       |  500              |  32             |
| [0.9877]{.colorMass} [pounds](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pound_(mass))                |  7000             |  448            |
| [0.9877]{.colorMass} [tons](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Short_ton)                     |  14000000         |  896000         |
:::
